seo.title: Seedream 5.0 Lite | BytePlus Image Generation & Editing | MaxVideoAI
seo.description: Create and edit still images with Seedream 5.0 Lite in MaxVideoAI. Use BytePlus ModelArk image generation for clean concepts, product frames, and reference images before Seedance animation.

overview: Seedream 5.0 Lite is a BytePlus ModelArk image generation and editing model for creating clean stills, product concepts, character frames, thematic image sets, and source images that can become stronger references before Seedance 2.0 or Seedance 2.0 Fast image-to-video work.
pricingNotes: Seedream 5.0 Lite is priced per successfully generated image by BytePlus ModelArk, including batch image sets. MaxVideoAI shows the active account price before generation.

hero.title: Seedream 5.0 Lite - BytePlus image generation and editing
hero.intro: Use Seedream 5.0 Lite as a standalone image model for text-to-image creation, image-to-image cleanup, batch image sets, and controlled reference stills before animating selected frames in Seedance.
hero.badge: Text -> Image · Image -> Image · Batch image sets · BytePlus ModelArk

items.title: Clean reference frames before image-to-video animation
Product stills with controlled backgrounds and lighting
Character, wardrobe, and prop concepts for storyboards
Storyboard, comic, and brand visual sets with a shared direction
Image edits that remove noise before motion tests

promptStructure.title: Prompt mini-guide
promptStructure.quote: [Subject] + [composition] + [lighting] + [style] + [what to preserve or change] + [Seedance reference goal].
promptStructure.description: Seedream works best when the still image brief is concrete. Describe the subject, frame, materials, lighting, and what must stay stable if the image will become a Seedance reference.
steps: Add lighting, environment, and material details
For image sets, state the desired count and shared theme
State what should stay clean for future animation
For edits, separate preserve instructions from changes
Choose the strongest still before moving into Seedance

tips.title: Reference workflow notes
items: Use Seedream to create cleaner, more controlled source images before animation.
Keep the subject readable and avoid overloaded backgrounds when the frame will feed image-to-video.
For product motion, use Seedream to settle packaging, reflections, and hero angle first.
Seedream may improve consistency and reduce friction compared with random external images, but Seedance still evaluates each prompt and source image.

prompts.title: Product reference frame
prompts.prompt: Premium studio still of a matte black travel mug on a clean graphite plinth, soft rim light, readable logo area, uncluttered background, centered hero angle for later image-to-video animation.

prompts.title: Character wardrobe concept
prompts.prompt: Full-body reference image of a courier in a rain jacket, neutral stance, clear silhouette, consistent wardrobe details, overcast city light, designed as a clean Seedance starting frame.

prompts.title: Edit for animation readiness
prompts.prompt: Clean this product image for animation: preserve the bottle shape and label hierarchy, remove distracting reflections, simplify the background, keep natural studio lighting.

prompts.title: Batch brand visual set
prompts.prompt: Generate six coherent launch visuals for a premium sleep mask brand: same product color, calm morning light, minimal bedroom styling, one image for hero product, one for texture detail, one for lifestyle use, one for packaging, one for social ad crop, one for Seedance reference.

faqs.a: Seedream 5.0 Lite is a BytePlus ModelArk image generation and editing model available in MaxVideoAI for still-image creation and reference preparation.

faqs.q: How does Seedream connect to Seedance?
faqs.a: Seedream is a recommended reference-image companion before Seedance 2.0 or Seedance 2.0 Fast. Create or clean a still image first, then use the selected frame as a stronger starting point for image-to-video.

faqs.q: Can Seedream generate batch image sets?
faqs.a: Yes. When you request more than one image, MaxVideoAI sends BytePlus sequential_image_generation as auto with a max image count. This is useful for storyboards, comics, product series, and brand visuals.
No. Seedream can help create cleaner source images, but Seedance still evaluates each prompt and source image under its own workflow and safety rules.

custom.heroSupportLine: Best for clean still images, image edits, and source frames before Seedance motion.
custom.whyTitle: Why Seedream fits the Seedance workflow
custom.heroDesc1: Seedream gives creators a focused still-image step before animation: generate the product shot, character frame, or environment plate first, then animate only the frame worth testing.
custom.heroDesc2: It is useful when a Seedance run needs a more deliberate source image than a loose prompt or an unprepared external upload.
heroHighlights: Standalone image model||Use Seedream for still generation and edits even when no video run follows.
Batch image output||Use sequential_image_generation=auto to generate storyboard, comic, product, or brand visual sets when one prompt needs related images.
Multi-image input||Blend subject, style, and scene references from 2-10 source images when the still needs controlled source material.
Reference preparation||Create cleaner, more controlled source images before Seedance animation.
Edit before motion||Refine products, backgrounds, wardrobe, and lighting before image-to-video.
Seedance companion||Send the selected still into Seedance 2.0 or Seedance 2.0 Fast when motion is the next step.

specSections.title: BytePlus workflow support
specSections.intro: The official BytePlus ModelArk Seedream 4.0-5.0 tutorial documents Seedream 5.0 Lite for text, single-image, and multi-image inputs.
items: Text-to-image: create a still image from a prompt with 2K, 3K, or 4K output controls.
Image-to-image: clean or edit an existing source image while preserving important visual details.
Multi-image input: blend subject, style, or scene elements from 2-10 reference images.
Batch image output: set sequential_image_generation=auto to create related image sets for storyboards, comics, product visuals, or brand systems.

specSections.title: Limits and billing behavior
items: Reference images plus requested outputs must stay within 15 total images.
MaxVideoAI prices Seedream by successfully generated image; failed or missing outputs should not be charged as completed images.
Output controls expose base resolution, aspect ratio, file format, and watermark options where supported.

custom.whatIntro1: Start in the Image Lab, create or edit the still in Seedream, then review whether the frame is clear enough for motion.
custom.whatIntro2: Use Seedance 2.0 for polished final animation or Seedance 2.0 Fast for quicker draft checks.
whatFlowSteps: Create or edit a still image with Seedream
Check subject clarity, background simplicity, and lighting consistency
Save the best frame as the animation reference
Use Seedance 2.0 Fast for draft motion checks
Use Seedance 2.0 when the approved frame needs a more polished final video
custom.tipsIntro: Treat Seedream as the still-image craft step. It can produce better source material, but it does not replace Seedance prompt and policy checks.
strengths: Generate clean product, character, and environment frames before animation.
Generate related image sets for storyboards, comics, product variations, and brand systems.
Use text, single-image, or multi-image inputs for creation, editing, and image fusion.
Use edit mode to reduce visual noise in existing source images.
Keep one clear subject per frame when the output will become image-to-video input.
Use the same language for subject, lighting, and style when moving from Seedream to Seedance.
boundaries: Batch requests must keep references plus generated outputs within 15 total images.
Seedance still evaluates each source image and prompt.
A cleaner reference image may improve consistency, but final animation handling and output quality still depend on the Seedance run.
Do not use Seedream to prepare content that violates MaxVideoAI or provider safety rules.
safetyRules: No sexual content or content involving minors.
No hateful, harassing, or graphic-violence requests.
Do not impersonate real people or public figures without consent.
Do not include private personal data or sensitive documents.
custom.promptingTitle: How to write a strong Seedream prompt
custom.promptingIntro: Write the still image as if it were the first frame of a shot: subject, composition, lighting, and constraints first.
custom.promptingTip: Tip: if the image is going into Seedance, mention the future motion goal without asking Seedream to animate it.
promptingGlobalPrinciples: Use one clean visual goal per image.
For image sets, name the sequence, count, and shared visual rules.
For edits, say what to preserve before what to change.
Keep the background simple when the still will become a video reference.
promptingEngineWhy: Controlled stills give image-to-video models clearer starting material.
Product and character references are easier to animate when silhouette, lighting, and props are already stable.
Drafting the still first helps separate image quality decisions from motion decisions.

relatedItems.title: Seedance 2.0
relatedItems.description: Animate a selected Seedream still with the standard Seedance route when you need a more polished image-to-video result.

relatedItems.title: Seedance 2.0 Fast
relatedItems.description: Use Fast for quicker motion drafts after Seedream has produced a clean reference image.
